body:
"Reach the Clouds, Dominate the Fight."
SKYFPS & (C)pvp is the ultimate lightweight performance modpack designed specifically for Android gamers using Pojav or Zalith Launcher. This pack is built for those who demand 120+ FPS and zero-latency response times in high-stakes Crystal PvP and Anarchy environments.

вңЁ Why SKYFPS & (C)pvp?

вҳҒпёҸ Cloud-Light Performance: Powered by a fine-tuned combination of Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight. It eliminates micro-stutters and provides the smoothest frame rates ever seen on mobile.

рҹ’Һ Specialized for cPvP: Includes the most essential tools for crystal combat. With Crystal Optimizer and Marlow's Fix, your hits will be faster and your view will be clearer.

рҹҢӘпёҸ Zero Visual Clutter: Featuring NoHurtCam, Low Fire, and Clean Glass. No more screen-shaking or annoying particles blocking your line of sight during explosions.

рҹ“ұ Pro-Mobile HUD: Custom-designed HUD for Android users to track Armor Durability, Ping, and FPS instantly without cluttering the screen.
